brand_identity.name: AcademiaOS
brand_identity.design_philosophy: Data Clarity over Decoration. Every pixel must serve the institution's efficiency.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, dashboard widget headers, and modal titles. DO NOT use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for data tables, form inputs, and general text. Optimize for high-density reading.

monospace.usage: Use for IDs (Student ID, Course Code), grades, and financial figures.

primary.name: Institutional Slate
primary.usage: Main navigation, primary buttons, active states.

dashboard.card_style: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

cards.default: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 p-6 shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md

buttons.primary: rounded-lg bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-lg border border-input bg-background shadow-sm hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: rounded-lg hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.outline: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

glassmorphism.header: bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200/50 dark:border-slate-800/50

assets.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width: 1.5px for UI, 2px for small icons.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA (4.5:1). Use 'text-slate-600' or darker on white backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings: 'focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary'.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all buttons on mobile.

general: Use the 'Manrope' font for all headings. Import it via Google Fonts or similar.
Implement a responsive sidebar for the dashboard layout.
Use shadcn/ui components for all interactive elements (dialogs, dropdowns, forms).
Ensure the 'Role Selection' landing page uses the 'Tetris Grid' layout with the Hero Background image.
Strictly follow the color palette. Do not use random hex codes.
Ensure dark mode support using Tailwind's 'dark:' variant.

specific_pages.landing: Hero section with 'University' background. Cards for 'Principal', 'Admin', 'Faculty', 'Student' using the Card component with unique icons.
specific_pages.dashboard_principal: High-density grid. Top row: Key Metrics (Total Students, Revenue, Attendance). Middle: Charts (Recharts). Bottom: Recent Activity Log.
specific_pages.student_portal: More visual. Use the 'students_group' image in a welcome banner. Display CGPA and Attendance in large, circular progress bars.

universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids and asymmetry.
Do not use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Check for 'transparent' backgrounds that might overlay content and fix them with solid colors or blurs.
